title: Operationalization (GSM v1)
description: Traced governance lineage path through the DPQR specificity gradient (Directive → Policy → {Rule, Qualifier}). Each instance pins one thread from the many-to-many DPQR web.

directive.description: Directive at the identity-level root (null = governance gap).

policy.description: Policy translating the Directive into a measurable boundary (null = gap or direct link).

rule.description: Rule operationalizing the Policy as behavioral logic (null = not yet operationalized or DPQ chain).

qualifier.description: Qualifier satisfying the Policy with a specific property value (null = not yet defined or DPR chain).

mutualExclusivity.description: rule and qualifier MUST NOT both be non-null on the same instance.
mutualExclusivity.check: NOT (rule IS NOT NULL AND qualifier IS NOT NULL)
